identity.name: AI Security Dashboard & Posture — Aggregate Rollup Across All AI Findings (T1526)
identity.summary: The closing scenario of the AI-SPM family verifies that the Cortex Cloud AI security dashboard aggregates everything AISP-01..05 surfaced: a total AI asset count matching the planted manifest, non-zero counts across the model_security / supply_chain / static_analysis / data_governance risk categories, and a populated trend series per category. Detections are framed as aggregate rollup queries (…
identity.description: The executive readout for AI Security Posture Management is a single dashboard that rolls up discovery, model-security, supply-chain, static-analysis, and data-governance findings into a prioritized posture view. This scenario closes the AISP family by verifying the dashboard's backing data is real and complete: the aggregate AI asset count matches the planted manifest, every risk category has a non-zero count, and the trend series returns at least one data point per category so charts are not empty. It must run after AISP-01..05 have planted and scanned, so the rollup has something to aggregate. Detection is posture-oriented and explicitly aggregate: validation queries summarize the findings produced by the other scenarios with comp count() by severity and by risk_category over the posture dataset, plus a time-bucketed rollup that proves a populated trend series. A correlation rule fires the executive posture-rollup event when the aggregate covers all four risk categories.

execution.framework_reference_id: SIM-AISPM-006 — Cortex Cloud AI-SPM dashboard summary + trend-series probe

prerequisites.description: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM enabled and AISP-01..05 already planted + scanned.
ai-spm IaC module applied; SIM-AISPM-001..005 executed first.

payload.code:
# Posture validation — fetch AI-SPM dashboard summary + trends.
curl -fsSL -H "Authorization: Bearer ${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_TOKEN}" "${CORTEX_CLOUD_API_BASE}/dashboards/ai_spm/summary" | jq '.total_ai_assets, .risk_categories'

expected_artifacts.description: Aggregate AI asset count and per-category risk rollup.
expected_artifacts.expected_value: total_ai_assets >= 6 and risk_categories populated for all four families

expected_artifacts.description: Trend series with at least one data point per risk category.

xql_queries.name: AISPM-006 Expected Aggregate Counts Bookkeeping
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cloud_audit_logs
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter operation_name = "terraform.output" and resource_tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| fields _time, operation_name, resource_tags

xql_queries.name: AISPM-006 Dashboard Summary Aggregate Across All Risk Categories
xql_queries.query:
dataset = cortex_cloud_posture
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding"
| filter risk_category in ("model_security", "supply_chain", "static_analysis", "data_governance")
| comp count() as findings by risk_category, severity
| filter findings >= 1
| fields risk_category, severity, findings

xql_queries.name: AISPM-006 Dashboard Trend Series Per Risk Category
xql_queries.query:
dataset = ai_spm_findings
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 86400)
| filter risk_category in ("model_security", "supply_chain", "static_analysis", "data_governance")
| comp count() as data_points by risk_category, bin(_time, 1h) as time_bucket
| comp count_distinct(time_bucket) as buckets by risk_category
| filter buckets >= 1
| fields risk_category, buckets

correlation_rules.name: AI Posture Rollup — Executive Dashboard Covers All Risk Categories
correlation_rules.logic: XQL(AISPM-006 Dashboard Summary Aggregate Across All Risk Categories) AND XQL(AISPM-006 Dashboard Trend Series Per Risk Category)

analytics_modules: Cortex Cloud AI-SPM — Aggregate posture rollup and executive summary
Cortex Cloud Posture — Risk-category trend-series aggregation

products.evidence_query: dataset = cortex_cloud_posture | filter tags contains "CortexSimAISPMFinding" | comp count() by risk_category, severity
Correlation CR-AISPM-0006 fires the executive posture-rollup event when the aggregate covers all four AI risk categories.

use_cases.name: AI Security Dashboard & Posture
use_cases.description: Aggregate all AI findings into an executive posture view with per-category counts and trend series.

test_cases.objective: Dashboard aggregates all four risk categories with populated trend series.
steps: Tour the AI-SPM dashboard in Cortex Cloud.
success_criteria: Summary rollup query returns >= 4 risk-category rows.
Correlation CR-AISPM-0006 fires the posture-rollup event.

preventive_controls: Wire the AI-SPM dashboard to live posture data, not stub aggregates.
Set risk-score thresholds that gate AI deployment promotion.
Review the executive AI posture rollup on a recurring cadence.
detection_engineering: Aggregate findings by risk_category and severity for the executive view.
Maintain per-category trend series to surface posture drift over time.
Alert when any risk category transitions from zero to non-zero findings.

references.title: Unit42 — Unifying AI Security Telemetry for Executive Visibility
MITRE ATT&CK T1526 — Cloud Service Discovery

changelog.author: Henry Reed
changelog.change: Authored real aggregate posture-rollup XQL against cortex_cloud_posture / ai_spm_findings, added correlation CR-AISPM-0006, enriched identity + panw_mapping. Promoted to active.
